title: Ceiling decoration by VASARI, Giorgio
highlights:
VASARI, Giorgio

(b. 1511, Arezzo, d. 1574, Firenze)

---

### Ceiling decoration Giorgio Vasari and assistants decorated the ceiling of the Sala di Cosimo il Vecchio in the Palazzo Vecchio in Florence.
